535 R2B R2B_COMPLETE_DT (R2B) Date Assessment Complete DATE 8 Assessment/discharge information: participation in assessment - date RN coordinator signed assessment as complete.
536 R3A R3A_DISCHARGE_CD (R3A) Resident Discharge Disposition Code CHAR 1 Assessment/discharge information: code for resident discharge disposition. 1 = Private home/apt. with no home health services, 2 = Private home/apt. with home health services, 3 = Board and
